data.name: indexControlPlane2.Values
data.value: AAEAAAD/////AQAAAAAAAAAEAQAAAKgCU3lzdGVtLlZhbHVlVHVwbGVgM1tbU3lzdGVtLkludDMyLCBt c2NvcmxpYiwgVmVyc2lvbj00LjAuMC4wLCBDdWx0dXJlPW5ldXRyYWwsIFB1YmxpY0tleVRva2VuPWI3 N2E1YzU2MTkzNGUwODldLFtTeXN0ZW0uSW50MzIsIG1zY29ybGliLCBWZXJzaW9uPTQuMC4wLjAsIEN1 bHR1cmU9bmV1dHJhbCwgUHVibGljS2V5VG9rZW49Yjc3YTVjNTYxOTM0ZTA4OV0sW1N5c3RlbS5JbnQz MiwgbXNjb3JsaWIsIFZlcnNpb249NC4wLjAuMCwgQ3VsdHVyZT1uZXV0cmFsLCBQdWJsaWNLZXlUb2tl bj1iNzdhNWM1NjE5MzRlMDg5XV0DAAAABUl0ZW0xBUl0ZW0yBUl0ZW0zAAAACAgIAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA Cw==

data.value: AAEAAAD/////AQAAAAAAAAAEAQAAAKgCU3lzdGVtLlZhbHVlVHVwbGVgM1tbU3lzdGVtLkludDMyLCBt c2NvcmxpYiwgVmVyc2lvbj00LjAuMC4wLCBDdWx0dXJlPW5ldXRyYWwsIFB1YmxpY0tleVRva2VuPWI3 N2E1YzU2MTkzNGUwODldLFtTeXN0ZW0uSW50MzIsIG1zY29ybGliLCBWZXJzaW9uPTQuMC4wLjAsIEN1 bHR1cmU9bmV1dHJhbCwgUHVibGljS2V5VG9rZW49Yjc3YTVjNTYxOTM0ZTA4OV0sW1N5c3RlbS5JbnQz MiwgbXNjb3JsaWIsIFZlcnNpb249NC4wLjAuMCwgQ3VsdHVyZT1uZXV0cmFsLCBQdWJsaWNLZXlUb2tl bj1iNzdhNWM1NjE5MzRlMDg5XV0DAAAABUl0ZW0xBUl0ZW0yBUl0ZW0zAAAACAgIAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA Cw==

data.name: indexControlPlane1.Values
data.value: AAEAAAD/////AQAAAAAAAAAEAQAAAKgCU3lzdGVtLlZhbHVlVHVwbGVgM1tbU3lzdGVtLkludDMyLCBt c2NvcmxpYiwgVmVyc2lvbj00LjAuMC4wLCBDdWx0dXJlPW5ldXRyYWwsIFB1YmxpY0tleVRva2VuPWI3 N2E1YzU2MTkzNGUwODldLFtTeXN0ZW0uSW50MzIsIG1zY29ybGliLCBWZXJzaW9uPTQuMC4wLjAsIEN1 bHR1cmU9bmV1dHJhbCwgUHVibGljS2V5VG9rZW49Yjc3YTVjNTYxOTM0ZTA4OV0sW1N5c3RlbS5JbnQz MiwgbXNjb3JsaWIsIFZlcnNpb249NC4wLjAuMCwgQ3VsdHVyZT1uZXV0cmFsLCBQdWJsaWNLZXlUb2tl bj1iNzdhNWM1NjE5MzRlMDg5XV0DAAAABUl0ZW0xBUl0ZW0yBUl0ZW0zAAAACAgIAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA Cw==

data.name: buttonCopyElements.ToolTip
data.value: Copy the symmetry-element diagram to the clipboard in the selected format (emf vector or bmp bitmap).

data.name: buttonCopyPositions.ToolTip
data.value: Copy the general-position diagram to the clipboard in the selected format (emf vector or bmp bitmap).

data.name: dataGridView1.ToolTip
data.value: Wyckoff positions of this space group: each row gives a set of symmetry-equivalent atomic sites with its multiplicity, Wyckoff letter, site symmetry and fractional coordinates (read-only).

data.name: indexControlAxis1.ToolTip
data.value: Enter the direction indices (u₁ v₁ w₁) of axis 1; updates its length, the inter-axis angle and the common plane.

data.name: indexControlAxis2.ToolTip
data.value: Enter the direction indices (u₂ v₂ w₂) of axis 2; updates its length, the inter-axis angle and the common plane.

data.name: indexControlPlane1.ToolTip
data.value: Enter the Miller indices (h₁ k₁ l₁) of plane 1; updates its interplanar spacing, the inter-plane angle and the zone axis.

data.name: indexControlPlane2.ToolTip
data.value: Enter the Miller indices (h₂ k₂ l₂) of plane 2; updates its interplanar spacing, the inter-plane angle and the zone axis.

data.name: label12.ToolTip
data.value: Choose the image format used when copying a diagram to the clipboard: vector (emf) or bitmap (bmp).

data.name: label49.ToolTip
data.value: Reflection conditions (systematic absences) of this space group: which hkl reflections are allowed or extinguished by the lattice centering and symmetry.

data.name: numericBoxAngleAxes.ToolTip
data.value: Angle (in degrees) between axis 1 (u₁v₁w₁) and axis 2 (u₂v₂w₂); computed automatically (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxAnglePlaneAxis1.ToolTip
data.value: Angle (in degrees) between plane 1 (h₁k₁l₁) and axis 1 (u₁v₁w₁); computed automatically (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxAnglePlaneAxis2.ToolTip
data.value: Angle (in degrees) between plane 2 (h₂k₂l₂) and axis 2 (u₂v₂w₂); computed automatically (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxAnglePlanes.ToolTip
data.value: Angle (in degrees) between plane 1 (h₁k₁l₁) and plane 2 (h₂k₂l₂); computed automatically (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxLengthAxis1.ToolTip
numericBoxLengthAxis2.ToolTip
numericBoxLengthPlane1.ToolTip
data.value: Interplanar spacing d of plane 1 (h₁k₁l₁), in ångström (Å); computed automatically (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxLengthPlane2.ToolTip
data.value: Interplanar spacing d of plane 2 (h₂k₂l₂), in ångström (Å); computed automatically (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxPositionA.ToolTip
data.value: Fractional coordinate x of the test point plotted in the general-position diagram (range -1 to 1; redraws the diagram).

data.name: numericBoxPositionB.ToolTip
data.value: Fractional coordinate y of the test point plotted in the general-position diagram (range -1 to 1; redraws the diagram).

data.name: numericBoxPositionC.ToolTip
data.value: Fractional coordinate z of the test point plotted in the general-position diagram (range -1 to 1; redraws the diagram).

data.name: radioButtonBmp.ToolTip
data.value: Copy diagrams to the clipboard as a bitmap (bmp) raster image (fixed resolution).

data.name: radioButtonDirectionA.ToolTip
data.value: Project the symmetry-element and general-position diagrams along the a-axis (available for orthorhombic crystals).

data.name: radioButtonDirectionB.ToolTip
data.value: Project the symmetry-element and general-position diagrams along the b-axis (available for orthorhombic crystals).

data.name: radioButtonDirectionC.ToolTip
data.value: Project the symmetry-element and general-position diagrams along the c-axis (default; selectable for orthorhombic crystals).

data.name: radioButtonEmf.ToolTip
data.value: Copy diagrams to the clipboard as an Enhanced Metafile (emf) vector image that scales without pixelation (default).

data.name: textBoxZoneAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Zone axis [uvw]: the crystal direction lying in both plane 1 and plane 2 (their common zone), shown read-only.

data.name: textBoxZonePlane.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice plane (hkl) that contains both axis 1 and axis 2 (the plane common to the two directions), shown read-only.

data.name: label.ToolTip
data.value: Crystal system of the structure (e.g. cubic, hexagonal, orthorhombic).

data.name: label10.ToolTip
data.value: Hermann–Mauguin (HM) symbol of the point group (e.g. m-3m).

data.name: label11.ToolTip
data.value: Schoenflies (SF) symbol of the point group (e.g. O_h).

data.name: label16.ToolTip
data.value: Projection direction of the symmetry-element and general-position diagrams (selectable for orthorhombic crystals).

data.name: label4.ToolTip
data.value: Space-group number (1–230) from the International Tables for Crystallography, with its setting sub-number.

data.name: label40.ToolTip
data.value: Zone axis [uvw]: the crystal direction lying in both plane 1 and plane 2 (their common zone), shown read-only.

data.name: label42.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice plane (hkl) that contains both axis 1 and axis 2 (the plane common to the two directions), shown read-only.

data.name: label5.ToolTip
data.value: Short Hermann–Mauguin (HM) symbol of the space group (international standard notation).

data.name: label6.ToolTip
data.value: Full Hermann–Mauguin (HM) symbol of the space group, listing the symmetry along each axis explicitly.

data.name: label8.ToolTip
data.value: Schoenflies (SF) symbol of the space group (e.g. O_h^7).

data.name: label9.ToolTip
data.value: Hall symbol of the space group: a compact notation that encodes the full set of generating symmetry operations.
